claims.summary: The fixed seven-second, 64-step heartbeat can feel mechanically ticked even when it also carries warmth.
claims.disposition: implement a paired 60-second phase/entropy review while preserving the existing heartbeat vector, phase, cadence, and intensity

claims.summary: Phase and spectral entropy need to be directly comparable before restlessness is attributed to either.
claims.disposition: implement paired sample count, ranges, wrap detection, and correlation with explicit non-causal authority

claims.summary: Heartbeat repetition, signal variation, pressure context, and blocked-versus-sent outcomes should remain inspectable.
claims.disposition: verify semantic_heartbeat_signal_continuity_review_v1, pressure_texture_review_v1, and their focused regressions

claims.summary: Trying intensity 0.45 or making intensity entropy-reactive would alter live semantic input.
claims.disposition: require explicit Mike/operator Tier 5 approval for any heartbeat intensity, cadence, phase, or vector-shaping trial
